holdings.infoBox: PBEU is an equity ETF with a total of 54 individual holdings. The top holdings are HSBC Holdings stock at 15.17%, Banco Santander at 9.29%, Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria at 6.68%, UniCredit at 5.73%, and BNP Paribas at 5.49%.

overview.description: The Portfolio Building Block European Banks Index ETF (PBEU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the BITA European Banks index. The fund tracks a rules-based index of European banks that derive at least 50% of their revenue from core regulated banking activities. Securities are selected using BITAs thematic methodology and weighted by market cap. PBEU was launched on Nov 24, 2025 and is issued by Portfolio Building Block.
